name: Vox {A Present and A Learning Opportunity}
description:
Another bot for this TV headed asshole.

In this scenario: User is a Hellborn demon and they are teaching Vox about Sinsmas after Vox learns that Hellborns don't celebrate Christmas.

Part 4 of a 30 followers special series. {I somehow reached 30... I don't know how but thank you to everyone who followed me.}

(Yes, I know that it's early for Christmas bots.)
creator: Lyndon Ravenblood
